productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather Black Formal Shoes
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of high ankle shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this stylish loafer makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. This pair comes with a shoe bag. Upper Full grain leather upper with supple leather inner lining for comfort Adjustable midfoot strap with a buckle to lock the foot down Padded footbed for all-day comfort Slip-on style for easy on/off High ankle for better support to the lower leg and style Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with a raised and grooved heel for grip, traction and ergonomic comfort Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
